overview:
• France – Stroll along the Champs-Élysées in Paris, admire the Eiffel Tower, visit the Louvre Museum, and enjoy the romance of the Seine River. Explore the scenic French Riviera with its glamorous beaches and historic towns like Nice and Monaco.
  • Switzerland – Experience the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps, visit the stunning cities of Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and take a scenic ride on the Glacier Express. Don’t miss the Jungfraujoch, the Matterhorn, and Lake Geneva for a picture-perfect Swiss adventure.
  • Italy – Discover the Eternal City of Rome, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Explore the artistic wonders of Florence, the romance of Venice, and the stunning coastal beauty of Amalfi and Cinque Terre. Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine and world-class wines.
  • Austria – Immerse yourself in the imperial grandeur of Vienna, with visits to Schönbrunn Palace and St. Stephen’s Cathedral. Experience the musical charm of Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hallstatt and Innsbruck in the Austrian Alps.

Welcome to your incredible European adventure with Travelxploria! Upon your arrival, our friendly Travelxploria representative will greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. Take some time to settle in and unwind, soaking in the excitement of the journey ahead. Whether you choose to explore the nearby surroundings or simply relax, this is your moment to ease into the experience. Later in the afternoon, you’ll find all the details about your upcoming tour conveniently displayed on the information boards at the hotel reception.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

Meet your Travelxploria representative at the designated meeting point and set off on an unforgettable Beaujolais Wine Tour through the rolling vineyards of one of France’s most celebrated wine regions. Led by an expert Travelxploria guide, visit charming family-run wineries, where you’ll savor exquisite Beaujolais wines, from fruity reds to elegant crus. Stroll through picturesque villages, meet passionate winemakers, and uncover the secrets behind traditional winemaking. With the best on-ground support staff, enjoy a seamless and enriching experience.

Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise
Ticket Included
City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise
Ticket Included
City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise
Ticket Included

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

As you enjoy your final breakfast of this unforgettable journey, take a moment to cherish the incredible memories you’ve made along the way. From breathtaking landscapes to rich cultural experiences, every moment has been a treasure. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any final arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Day 3 -Paris
Visit the Eiffel Tower
Ticket Included
Visit the Eiffel Tower
Ticket Included
Visit the Eiffel Tower
Ticket Included

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Day 3 -Paris

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Meet your Travelxploria representative at the designated meeting point and set off on an unforgettable Beaujolais Wine Tour through the rolling vineyards of one of France’s most celebrated wine regions. Led by an expert Travelxploria guide, visit charming family-run wineries, where you’ll savor exquisite Beaujolais wines, from fruity reds to elegant crus. Stroll through picturesque villages, meet passionate winemakers, and uncover the secrets behind traditional winemaking. With the best on-ground support staff, enjoy a seamless and enriching experience.

Day 6 -Zurich
City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise
Ticket Included
City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise

Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.

Day 7 -Zurich
Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the "Glacier Village," where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

Day 10 -Rome

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

day_details.day_summary: Welcome to your incredible European adventure with Travelxploria! Upon your arrival, our friendly Travelxploria representative will greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. Take some time to settle in and unwind, soaking in the excitement of the journey ahead. Whether you choose to explore the nearby surroundings or simply relax, this is your moment to ease into the experience. Later in the afternoon, you’ll find all the details about your upcoming tour conveniently displayed on the information boards at the hotel reception.

day_details.day_summary: We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

rowData.a_details: Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

day_details.day_summary: We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

rowData.a_details: Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

rowData.a_name: Paris Seine River Cruise with Dinner
rowData.a_details: Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

day_details.day_summary: Meet your Travelxploria representative at the designated meeting point and set off on an unforgettable Beaujolais Wine Tour through the rolling vineyards of one of France’s most celebrated wine regions. Led by an expert Travelxploria guide, visit charming family-run wineries, where you’ll savor exquisite Beaujolais wines, from fruity reds to elegant crus. Stroll through picturesque villages, meet passionate winemakers, and uncover the secrets behind traditional winemaking. With the best on-ground support staff, enjoy a seamless and enriching experience.

day_details.day_summary:
Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

3.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/ibis Styles Zurich City Center/1744108102562-b5j7_ho_03_p_1024x768 (1).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/ibis Styles Zurich City Center/1744108102730-b5j7_ho_00_p_1024x768 (1).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/ibis Styles Zurich City Center/1744108102780-331695814.jpg"}]

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/DORMERO Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153270075-DORMERO_Hotel_Zurich_Restaurant_03.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/DORMERO Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153270185-Zurich_Airport_Zimmer_3.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/DORMERO Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153270222-Zurich_Airport_AuÃen_1.jpg"}]

day_details.day_title: Zurich City Tour with Lake Cruise
day_details.day_summary: With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

rowData.a_name: City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise
rowData.a_details: Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.
rowData.images: [{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise/1740742887300-lucerne-5175322_640.jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise/1740742887437-lake-1681485_640.jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise/1740742887485-istockphoto-1500592649-612x612.jpg"}]

day_details.day_title: Zurich to Lucerne & Stay at Zurich
day_details.day_summary: Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

rowData.a_name: Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train
rowData.a_details: Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the "Glacier Village," where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.
rowData.images: [{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277281-mountain-6741996_640 (1).jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277395-istockphoto-945092130-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277427-istockphoto-584784714-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277437-istockphoto-1072027966-612x612.jpg"}]

day_details.day_title: Zurich to Milan Enroute to Bellinzona & Como
day_details.day_summary: We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

5.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Milan/Four Seasons Hotel Milano/1744108544958-MIL_1485_original.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Milan/Four Seasons Hotel Milano/1744108545104-leonardo-21829-162121661-892048.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Milan/Four Seasons Hotel Milano/1744108545217-MIL_530_original.jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

5.h_name: Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel
5.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Rome/Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel/1744108899161-images (53).jpeg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Rome/Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel/1744108899218-PetroniusSuiteBedroom.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Rome/Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel/1744108899334-Rome_Cavalieri_A_Waldorf_Astoria_Hotel-Rome-Pool-14-32608.jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary:
In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

rowData.a_details: Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

day_details.day_summary: Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

5.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Florence/Four Seasons Hotel Firenze/1744109276889-108139374.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Florence/Four Seasons Hotel Firenze/1744109276989-FLO_2723_original.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Florence/Four Seasons Hotel Firenze/1744109277034-4-seasons-loggia.jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438755-unnamed (15).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438824-unnamed (14).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438859-unnamed (13).jpg"}]

5.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/The St. Regis Venice/1744109890801-hotel-view.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/The St. Regis Venice/1744109890960-images (54).jpeg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/The St. Regis Venice/1744109890962-The-St.-Regis-Venice-Roof-Garden-Suite_ph.Niall_Clutton-2.jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Vienna/MOXY VIENNA CITY EAST/1741603656137-2024-11-13 (3).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Vienna/MOXY VIENNA CITY EAST/1741603656205-2024-11-13 (2).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Vienna/MOXY VIENNA CITY EAST/1741603656209-2024-11-13 (1).jpg"}]

5.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Vienna/Hotel Sans Souci Wien/1744110817426-images (57).jpeg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Vienna/Hotel Sans Souci Wien/1744110817426-89476115.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Vienna/Hotel Sans Souci Wien/1744110817544-sans-souci-wien_master-suite_c_gregor-titze-1120x540.jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

As you enjoy your final breakfast of this unforgettable journey, take a moment to cherish the incredible memories you’ve made along the way. From breathtaking landscapes to rich cultural experiences, every moment has been a treasure. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any final arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.
